sessions.details: Peel Session #3. Recorded 1977-06-27, first TX 1977-07-04. No known commercial release.

transcript.text: On 275 and 285, also in stereo on VHF, this is National Radio 1.
Well, hello there. This is TV on the Radio here, Thomas the Vance, and welcome once again to The Friday Rock Show.
Right, tonight, an archive session by a guy that deserves an award for just staying in the race, as recorded in 1977 from Birmingham, the Steve Gibbons Band.
Also, we repeat our recent set by the group called White Spirit.
And we've got some new releases by Pat Travers, Whitesnake, Exposa, The Outlaws, Ted Nugent, Loverboy, Rose Tattoo, and Trust.
And some classics from UFO, Steppenwolf, Mountain, and ACDC, among others.
Not forgetting our Friday night connection.
But this evening, we start with this.
That, of course, was UFO from their double live album, Strangers in the Night.
The track was Dr. Doctor.

who goes to the schoolhouse in Sherbourne and Dorset.

and everybody in the lower sixth of schoolhouse in Sherbourne.
